title: dactylis glomerata var. marina
intro: Dactylis glomerata var. marina, also known as coastal cocksfoot or sea bent grass, is a coastal grass species within the dactylis genus. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which have been used to treat various health conditions, including digestive issues and skin irritations. The health benefits of Dactylis glomerata var. marina include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and support immune function. Herbal preparations of this plant are typically made from its leaves and flowers, and can be found in the form of teas, infusions, and tinctures.
